proposal_rationale: The Perioperative Patient Flow blueprint sits within Healthcare (canonical top-level) but needs a more specific sub-domain covering OR scheduling, perioperative care, surgical team workflows, and operating theatre management. Future blueprints on specific surgical specialties (orthopedic OR ergonomics, cardiac surgery flow, ambulatory surgery centers, day-surgery units) would all share this sub-domain. Analogous to how the ENT Clinic walkthrough (201) proposed 'Outpatient Care' and 'Specialty Clinics' as non-canonical sub-domains of Healthcare.

The PMC7333415 paper (context row 1) uses Delmia by Dassault Systèmes to simulate orthopedic OR setups for TKA and THA procedures. Delmia is a real, well-known commercial DES platform that should be part of SimVault's canonical product seed. Proposed code: delmia. Vendor: Dassault Systèmes. Product type: commercial. Primary language: Visual/GUI. Description: multi-purpose digital manufacturing and operations simulation platform supporting DES of manufacturing processes, workflow analysis, and human-centered process design. Extends the seed beyond the existing 14 products, particularly into human-factors and ergonomic simulation use cases.
